<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Sun Do | Guid=3035-8116 | Deck=Sun Do is a city in southeastern Outworld. | Characters=Characters/Li_Mei | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Outworld | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3512082-9010165944-1000.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3512082-9010165944-1000.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
==Overview== Sun Do is a city in [[Locations/Outworld|Outworld]].
===Original Timeline=== Sun Do is first mentioned in [[Games/Mortal_Kombat_Deadly_Alliance|Deadly Alliance]] as the home of [[Characters/Li_Mei|Li Mei]], but first appears during the Konquest mode in [[Games/Mortal_Kombat_Deception|MK Deception]]. In this timeline, [[Characters/Quan_Chi|Quan Chi]] and [[Characters/Shang_Tsung|Shang Tsung]] convinced [[Characters/Kano|Kano]] to invade the village and enslave everyone there. Li Mei enters the Mortal Kombat tournament in an attempt to free her people from the sorcerers' captivity. [[Characters/Shujinko|Shujinko]] crosses paths with her on his 40-year journey and teaches her new fighting techniques.
====Raiden's Timeline==== After the events of [[Games/Mortal_Kombat_Armageddon|Armageddon]], Raiden successfully passes a message to his past self as a warning. Raiden attempts to change certain events to prevent the end of the world. In this timeline, Sun Do becomes a hot spot for war. It is here where [[Characters/Kotal_Kahn|Kotal Kahn]]'s imperial forces clash with [[Characters/Mileena|Mileena]]'s rebels for control of [[Locations/Outworld|Outworld]].
====Liu Kang's Timeline==== After the events of [[Games/Mortal_Kombat_11|Mortal Kombat 11]], Liu Kang becomes the arbiter of time and resets everything. In this timeline, Sun Do becomes the capital city of [[Locations/Outworld|Outworld]]. It is here where [[Locations/The_Great_Hall|The Great Hall]] of the emperor is found along with the beautiful Hanging Gardens. During the events of [[Games/Mortal_Kombat_1|Mortal Kombat 1]], there is a festival taking place in the city.

{{Location | Name=Surfers Paradise Street Circuit | Guid=3035-8023 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Sydney Motorsport Park | Guid=3035-8013 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Sydney }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> '''Sydney Motorsport Park '''(known until May 2012 as '''Eastern Creek International Raceway''') is a motorsport circuit located on Brabham Drive, Eastern Creek (40-kilometres west of the Sydney CBD), New South Wales, Australia.

{{Location | Name=Taco Bell | Guid=3035-8093 | Deck=Taco Bell is a Mexican-American fast food chain started in California. | {{Location | Name=Taco Bell Cantina | Guid=3035-8395 | Deck=Taco Bell Cantina is an upscaled versions of their more fast-casual counterparts. Cantinas are known to serve alcoholic drinks in addition to the Taco Bell menu. | Characters=Characters/Tony_Hawk | Concepts=Concepts/Product_Placement | Objects=Objects/Alcoholic_Beverages,Objects/Avocado,Objects/Bell,Objects/Burrito,Objects/Chalupa,Objects/Cheese,Objects/Cinnamon,Objects/Cinnamon_Twists,Objects/Corn,Objects/Cup,Objects/Deep_Fryer,Objects/Doritos,Objects/Flour,Objects/French_Fries,Objects/Fried_Chicken,Objects/Gordita,Objects/Grilled_Cheese,Objects/Ice_Block,Objects/Ice_Cream,Objects/Ice_Cream_Freezer,Objects/Lettuce,Objects/Meat,Objects/Milkshake,Objects/Mountain_Dew,Objects/Nachos,Objects/Pepsi,Objects/Pizza,Objects/Quesadilla,Objects/Red_Bull,Objects/Shower_Head,Objects/Soda_Fountain,Objects/Soft_Drink,Objects/Steel_Chair,Objects/Sugar,Objects/Table,Objects/Taco,Objects/Taquito,Objects/Tea,Objects/Tea_Bags,Objects/Tomato,Objects/Tortillas,Objects/Water | Locations=Locations/Alabama,Locations/Arizona,Locations/Beach,Locations/Berkeley,Locations/Bloomington,Locations/Brooklyn,Locations/California,Locations/Chestnut_Hill,Locations/Chicago,Locations/Connecticut,Locations/Earth,Locations/Florida,Locations/Fort_Lauderdale,Locations/Illinois,Locations/Indiana,Locations/Indianapolis,Locations/Kansas_City,Locations/Las_Vegas,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/Madison,Locations/Massachusetts,Locations/Missouri,Locations/Montana,Locations/Nashville,Locations/Nevada,Locations/New_Haven,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/North_America,Locations/Orlando,Locations/Phoenix,Locations/Puerto_Rico,Locations/Sacramento,Locations/San_Diego,Locations/San_Francisco,Locations/San_Jose,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/Tempe,Locations/Tennessee,Locations/Texas,Locations/The_Bronx,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Washington_D_C,Locations/Wisconsin,Locations/Yankee_Stadium | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3777977-15778554_010825-kgo-taco-bell-cantina-pacifica-img.jpg}}

Cantinas are known to serve alcoholic drinks in addition to the Taco Bell menu.

{{Location | Name=The Dreaming City | Guid=3035-7945 | Deck=The Dreaming City is a destination in Forsaken, featuring many endgame activities, such as the Last Wish raid and the Blind Well horde activity. It is the most sacred location of the Reefborn Awoken, and is where they study and meditate on greater paracausal powers through dreaming. | Characters=Characters/Mara_Sov,Characters/Riven_of_a_Thousand_Voices,Characters/Uldren_Sov | Concepts=Concepts/Awoken,Concepts/Hive,Concepts/Insectoid_Humanoid,Concepts/Scorn,Concepts/Taken | Objects= | Locations=Locations/The_Reef | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3439729-5214814715-.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3439729-5214814715-.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_avatar,scale_small,square_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Dreaming City is a destination in Forsaken, featuring many endgame activities, such as the Last Wish raid and the Blind Well horde activity. It is the most sacred location of the Reefborn Awoken, and is where they study and meditate on greater paracausal powers through dreaming.

{{Location | Name=The Fire Temple | Guid=3035-8099 | Deck=The home of Fire God Liu Kang, the protector of Earthrealm. | Characters=Characters/Liu_Kang | Concepts=Concepts/God | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3498859-8899202854-F44JKHpakAAXrIl.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=The Gateway | Guid=3035-8107 | Deck=One of several massive portals built by Titan Shang Tsung to invade this timeline. | Characters=Characters/Shang_Tsung | Concepts=Concepts/Portal | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3502800-6470169892-F6KmVAdaQAAY3Kk.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3502800-6470169892-F6KmVAdaQAAY3Kk.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,scale_super,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_small,scale_large,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> One of several massive portals built by Titan Shang Tsung to invade this timeline.

{{Location | Name=The Great Hall | Guid=3035-8100 | Deck=The throne room for the emperor of Outworld. | Characters=Characters/Kitana,Characters/Mileena,Characters/Sindel | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Outworld | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3499927-5459085111-F5R5FT2aYAAGria.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3499927-5459085111-F5R5FT2aYAAGria.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,screen_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_large,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick_wide,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":{"file":"3499927-5459085111-F5R5FT2aYAAGria.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,screen_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_large,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick_wide,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null}}' /> The throne room for the emperor of Outworld.

{{Location | Name=The Hourglass | Guid=3035-8111 | Deck=Guarded by Geras, the Hourglass is an object that regulates the flow of time itself in the Mortal Kombat universe. | Characters=Characters/Geras,Characters/Kronika,Characters/Liu_Kang | Concepts=Concepts/Time_Manipulation | Objects=Objects/Hourglass | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3505451-7762568774-F6-y_zLbkAAgiqt.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3505451-7762568774-F6-y_zLbkAAgiqt.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,square_medium,square_small,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_super,square_mini,scale_small,square_tiny,square_avatar,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Guarded by Geras, the Hourglass is an object that regulates the flow of time itself in the Mortal Kombat universe.

{{Location | Name=The Nexus | Guid=3035-7933 | Deck=Headquarters of the Andromeda Initiative, the Nexus is a massive space station designed to anchor the returning arks, process resources, and support colonists before their departure to new worlds. All new arrivals must pass quarantine. | Characters=Characters/Avitus_Rix,Characters/Nakmor_Kesh,Characters/Zevin_Raeka | Concepts=Concepts/Colony,Concepts/Quest_Hub | Objects=Objects/Space_Station | Locations=Locations/Andromeda_Galaxy,Locations/Space_Station | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3438095-7120455808-1000.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3438095-7120455808-1000.png","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Headquarters of the Andromeda Initiative, the Nexus is a massive space station designed to anchor the returning arks, process resources, and support colonists before their departure to new worlds. All new arrivals must pass quarantine.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=The Palace of Westminster | Guid=3035-8185 | Deck=Is the meeting place of the Parliament of the United Kingdom and is located in London, England. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3597418-%D0%91%D1%83%D1%84%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%BC%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B005.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3597418-\u0411\u0443\u0444\u0435\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043c\u0435\u043d\u043005.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,scale_tiny,scale_super,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":"Soccer Kid"},"background":[]}' /> Is the meeting place of the Parliament of the United Kingdom and is located in London, England.

{{Location | Name=The Pale Heart | Guid=3035-8305 | Deck=The Pale Heart of the Traveler is a destination in The Final Shape located within the Traveler. | Characters=Characters/Cayde_6,Characters/Ikora_Rey,Characters/Targe,Characters/The_Witness,Characters/Uldren_Sov,Characters/Zavala | Concepts=Concepts/Cabal_9935,Concepts/Fallen_9932,Concepts/Hive,Concepts/Lucent_Brood,Concepts/Psion,Concepts/Shadow_Legion,Concepts/Taken,Concepts/The_Dread,Concepts/Vex | Objects=Objects/The_Traveler | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3636971-8053167447-Pale_.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3636971-8053167447-Pale_.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Pale Heart of the Traveler is a destination in The Final Shape located within the Traveler.

{{Location | Name=The Reef | Guid=3035-7946 | Deck=he Reef is a debris field in orbit within the Asteroid belt in the Sol System. and the domain of an expansive Awoken nation under Queen Mara Sov. It is considered by the City to straddle the boundary between the far edge of the Traveler's influence and the unabated darkness beyond the Inner System. It is home to the Prison of Elders which was overseen by Variks the Loyal before the Red War, As well as The Tangled Shore ruled by The Spider and his crime syndicate. | Characters=Characters/Araskes_the_Trickster,Characters/Elykris_the_Machinist,Characters/Hiraks_The_Mindbender,Characters/Kaniks_the_Mad_Bomber,Characters/Mara_Sov,Characters/Pirrha_the_Rifleman,Characters/Reksis_Vahn_the_Hangman,Characters/Skolas_Kell_of_Kells,Characters/The_Spider_37714,Characters/Uldren_Sov,Characters/Variks,Characters/Xur,Characters/Yaviks_the_Rider | Concepts=Concepts/Awoken,Concepts/Cabal_9935,Concepts/Fallen_9932,Concepts/Hive,Concepts/Insectoid_Humanoid,Concepts/Scorn | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Asteroid,Locations/Asteroid_Field,Locations/The_Dreaming_City | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3439732-6206967451-The_r.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3439732-6206967451-The_r.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> he Reef is a debris field in orbit within the Asteroid belt in the Sol System. and the domain of an expansive Awoken nation under Queen Mara Sov. It is considered by the City to straddle the boundary between the far edge of the Traveler's influence and the unabated darkness beyond the Inner System. It is home to the Prison of Elders which was overseen by Variks the Loyal before the Red War, As well as The Tangled Shore ruled by The Spider and his crime syndicate.

{{Location | Name=The Tea House | Guid=3035-8102 | Deck=Madam Bo's tea house is the most popular gathering place in Fengjian. | Characters=Characters/Kung_Lao,Characters/Madam_Bo,Characters/Raiden | Concepts=Concepts/Monks | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Wu_Shi_Academy | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3498171-5676752861-F4pRtpCbgAAhEJg.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3498171-5676752861-F4pRtpCbgAAhEJg.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_small,square_mini,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick_wide,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":{"file":"3498171-5676752861-F4pRtpCbgAAhEJg.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_small,square_mini,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick_wide,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null}}' /> Madam Bo's tea house is the most popular gathering place in Fengjian.

{{Location | Name=Theed | Guid=3035-8425 | Deck=Theed was the capital city of the Naboo, a society of humans who lived on the planet of the same name. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Capital_City,Concepts/Plasma_Droid | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Naboo,Locations/Palace | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3824197-3372853935-707b9.gif}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3824197-3372853935-707b9.gif","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/gif","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Theed was the capital city of the Naboo, a society of humans who lived on the planet of the same name.

{{Location | Name=Thousand Oaks | Guid=3035-8073 | Deck=Thousand Oaks is a city in California that is in Ventura County. Known to be one of the safest cities in America, it is home to many well-known celebrities. | Characters=Characters/Caitlyn_Jenner,Characters/Johnny_Cash,Characters/Lance_Armstrong,Characters/Tiger_Woods,Characters/Tony_Ferguson,Characters/Wayne_Gretzky | Concepts=Concepts/Basset_Hound,Concepts/Buddhism,Concepts/French_Bulldog,Concepts/Gangs,Concepts/German_Shepherd,Concepts/Golf,Concepts/Ice_Hockey,Concepts/Lawbreaking,Concepts/Los_Angeles_Rams,Concepts/Mixed_Martial_Arts,Concepts/Police | Objects=Objects/Avocado,Objects/Baguette,Objects/Bulgogi,Objects/Burrito,Objects/Cappuccino,Objects/Car,Objects/Cell_Phone,Objects/Chalupa,Objects/Cheese,Objects/Chicken_Coop,Objects/Cinnamon_Twists,Objects/Coca_Cola,Objects/Espresso,Objects/Fried_Chicken,Objects/Fried_Rice,Objects/Game_Controller,Objects/Golf_Ball,Objects/Golf_Cart,Objects/Golf_Club,Objects/Golf_Tee,Objects/Gordita,Objects/Grilled_Cheese,Objects/Gun,Objects/Hamburger,Objects/Kimchi,Objects/Milkshake,Objects/Mini_Cooper,Objects/Mountain_Dew,Objects/Oak_Tree,Objects/Pepsi,Objects/Phone,Objects/Pizza,Objects/Police_Car,Objects/Quesadilla,Objects/Red_Bull,Objects/Roast_Chicken,Objects/Scone,Objects/Soda_Fountain,Objects/Soft_Drink,Objects/Sports_Car,Objects/Tortilla_Chips,Objects/Tree,Objects/Turkey,Objects/Water,Objects/Yarmulke | Locations=Locations/7_Eleven,Locations/California,Locations/Cannabis_Dispensary,Locations/Church,Locations/College,Locations/Desert,Locations/Earth,Locations/Lake,Locations/Lake_Sherwood,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/McDonalds,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oxnard,Locations/Restaurant,Locations/School,Locations/Sherwood_Country_Club,Locations/Subway_3041,Locations/Synagogue,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/U_S_Route_101,Locations/Ventura_County,Locations/Waterfall,Locations/Wendys | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3480153-thousand_oaks_california__4088x1591____v1600x450__crop.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3480153-thousand_oaks_california__4088x1591____v1600x450__crop.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Thousand Oaks is a city in California that is in Ventura County. Known to be one of the safest cities in America, it is home to many well-known celebrities.

{{Location | Name=Three Fingered Jack | Guid=3035-8363 | Deck=Three Fingered Jack is a summit in Oregon. | Characters=Characters/Deacon_St_John | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732383-three_fingered_jack_from_southwest_on_pct_p3025.jpeg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3732383-three_fingered_jack_from_southwest_on_pct_p3025.jpeg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_avatar,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,square_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Three Fingered Jack is a summit in Oregon.

{{Location | Name=Tiburon Stadium | Guid=3035-8383 | Deck=The Tiburon Sports Complex is where the Maitland Tiburon team plays. It has a grass field surface type and a capacity of 26,000. The stadium itself in the PC, PS1, and N64 versions has many depictions of hammerhead sharks alike with one end featuring teeth of a hammerhead shark as well. In the PS2, Xbox, and GameCube versions, the stadium is completely different with rows of seats jutting out of the stadium resembling shark teeth all encapsulated within an open canopy-like structure. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3759900-4968219971-maxre.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3759900-4968219971-maxre.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Tiburon Sports Complex is where the Maitland Tiburon team plays. It has a grass field surface type and a capacity of 26,000. The stadium itself in the PC, PS1, and N64 versions has many depictions of hammerhead sharks alike with one end featuring teeth of a hammerhead shark as well. In the PS2, Xbox, and GameCube versions, the stadium is completely different with rows of seats jutting out of the stadium resembling shark teeth all encapsulated within an open canopy-like structure.

{{Location | Name=Tilted Towers | Guid=3035-8368 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Tilted Town | Guid=3035-8375 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Times Square | Guid=3035-8119 | Characters=Characters/Bullseye,Characters/Daredevil,Characters/Deadpool,Characters/Iron_Fist,Characters/Luke_Cage,Characters/Max_Dillon,Characters/Max_Payne,Characters/Miles_Morales,Characters/Otto_Octavius,Characters/Peter_Parker,Characters/Spider_Man_2099,Characters/Steve_Rogers,Characters/Tony_Stark,Characters/Venom_40923 | Concepts=Concepts/Fake_In_game_Advertising,Concepts/In_Game_Advertising | Objects=Objects/Billboard,Objects/Neon_Sign | Locations=Locations/Adidas,Locations/Earth,Locations/Manhattan,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/North_America,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3514135-zj1vebu2d6xxjcrswjre.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3514135-zj1vebu2d6xxjcrswjre.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_avatar,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Toledo | Guid=3035-8269 | Deck=A city in Ohio on the border with Michigan. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Toledo_Rockets | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Ohio,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614435-8541748671-Downt.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3614435-8541748671-Downt.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A city in Ohio on the border with Michigan.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Tomb of the Dragon Army | Guid=3035-8108 | Deck=The Dragon Army was assembled to protect Emperor Ying in the afterlife. Now, sorcerers are attempting to use the army for their own means. | Characters=Characters/Bi_Han,Characters/Kuai_Liang,Characters/Liu_Kang,Characters/Quan_Chi,Characters/Shang_Tsung,Characters/Smoke | Concepts=Concepts/Royalty,Concepts/Undead | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3503170-5172577867-F6VS4D_boAApmLq.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3503170-5172577867-F6VS4D_boAApmLq.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_large,scale_super,scale_small,square_medium,square_tiny,square_small,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_mini,screen_medium,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Dragon Army was assembled to protect Emperor Ying in the afterlife. Now, sorcerers are attempting to use the army for their own means.

{{Location | Name=Tonga | Guid=3035-7991 | Deck=Tonga is an island kingdom in the South Pacific Ocean. Its capital city is Nuku alofa. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Island,Locations/Pacific_Ocean | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3821209-2631825964-1920p.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3821209-2631825964-1920p.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_small,scale_medium,square_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Tonga is an island kingdom in the South Pacific Ocean. Its capital city is Nuku alofa.

{{Location | Name=Tonka Town | Guid=3035-8043 | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Touge | Guid=3035-8256 | Deck=Touges are places in Japan that are popular for tuned-up drifting cars at night. | Characters=Characters/Keisuke_Takahashi,Characters/Ryosuke_Takahashi,Characters/Takumi_Fujiwara | Concepts=Concepts/Drifting | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Muscle_Car,Objects/Sedan,Objects/Sports_Car | Locations=Locations/France,Locations/Japan,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3605402-img_2302.jpeg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3605402-img_2302.jpeg","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_mini,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,square_tiny,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Touges are places in Japan that are popular for tuned-up drifting cars at night.
